eventh Biennial Ptolemy Miniconference Friday, October 16, 2015, Berkeley, California The Eleventh Biennial Ptolemy Miniconference was held on Friday. October 16, 2015 in Berkeley, California in the Bancroft Hotel Great Hall. The Ptolemy project stud

ancroft Hotel Great Hall. The Ptolemy project studies modeling, simulation, and design of concurrent, real-time, embedded systems. The focus is on assembly of concurrent components. The Ptolemy Miniconference is an opportunity for research collaborat

nference is an opportunity for research collaborators and Ptolemy users and extenders from industry, academia, and government to get together, present their work to the Ptolemy community, and hear about related research and results. It is typically h

ut related research and results. It is typically held every two years. In addition, the meeting acted as an annual meeting for the Center for Hybrid and Embedded Software Systems . Dates Tuesday, March 24, 2015 Call for abstracts Friday, July 31, 201

h 24, 2015 Call for abstracts Friday, July 31, 2015 Abstracts due Friday, August 14, 2015 Notification of acceptance or rejection Friday, October 2, 2015 Registration closes Friday, October 16, 2015 Conference at the Bancroft Hotel Please direct ques
